The '''WBY-102 FirstMate''' was a specialized [[Droid/Legends#Classof droids|third-degree]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] programmed to instruct people in sailing, caring for and navigating a multi-crewed sailing vessel. It was sheathed in waterproof hard plastic. It has an inflatable [[flotation bag]] designed to deploy if the droid was submerged in water.

==Description==
The WBY-102 droid—commonly known as a "Webby"—was humanoid, with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and two legs, and built-in [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial compensators]] allowed the droid to remain steady on a boat's deck during rough weather. It was covered in a waterproof hard-impact [[Plastic/Legends|plastic]] shell which was [[Color/Legends|colored]] a deep blue, and its chest compartment contained an emergency [[flotation bag]] that could be deployed in the event of the droid's submersion in [[Ocean/Legends|water]]. A [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] was linked to this feature, allowing the droid to broadcast a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]]. The WBY-102 utilized an [[AA-1 VerboBrain/Legends|AA-1 VerboBrain]] for cognitive processing, and a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] that allowed the droid to speak in a calm, confident voice. Visual and auditory [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] were installed, but were limited to a Human range.<ref name="TSR" />

==Role==
The WBY-102 FirstMate was an uncommon variant of the [[WBY series]] of specialized [[Droid/Legends#Classes of droids|third-degree]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] designed to instruct [[Human/Legends|Humans]] in the use of mechanical vehicles. The 102 variant was programmed to teach Humans how to sail, crew, and care for a multi-sail [[Boat/Legends|boat]] or [[Yacht (aquatic)/Legends|yacht]], and could also serve as a member of the crew itself. WBY-102 droids had a stable personality, and were completely unfazed by violent weather or seabourne disasters. The WBY-102 was less reliable, however, when confronted with stressful situations that lay outside its core programming, such was [[lightfight]]s.<ref name="TSR" />

==History==
[[Seth Cambriel]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Spira/Legends|Spira]] owned a [[Seth Cambriel's WBY-102 FirstMate droid|WBY-102 droid]]. During a mission to recover Alliance supplies from Spira's oceans, he used the droid to train a group of Rebel agents in the sailing of his yacht, the ''[[Cambus Gale]]''.<ref name="TSR" />
